title: Visual Beacon Effects
description: This mod adds rings to the beams of beacons and greatly increases their viewing distance.
body:
### Visual Beacon Effects 
This mod adds costomizable Ring efects to the beams of beacons
It also greatly increases the viewing distance of the beacon beam
the key B will bring up the config
This mod has Iris/complementary shader support

### planed fixes and improvements 
- dimension specific beacon saveing
- improved animation 
- improved geometry 
- distant beacon size fix


### Notes
> Mod will likely have bugs
> Made with the help of ai
